svg.title: VPC project challenge map
svg.desc: Five challenge areas mapped to architectural solutions in the 3-tier VPC project

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about network segmentation in this VPC project')
sendPrompt('How do the three subnet tiers enforce isolation?')
g.text: Public / app / data tiers across 3 AZs

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What risks come from uncontrolled outbound traffic?')
g.text: Private instances can reach internet freely

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do NAT Gateways and VPC Endpoints control egress?')
sendPrompt('What compliance issues arise without network access controls?')
sendPrompt('How do NACLs and security groups address compliance?')
sendPrompt('Why is manual AWS console provisioning risky at scale?')
g.text: No version control, drift, not repeatable

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Terraform solve the manual provisioning problem?')
sendPrompt('What are the risks of no CI/CD for infrastructure changes?')
sendPrompt('How does Checkov in GitHub Actions catch Terraform misconfigurations?')
